excerpt: The official programme page for MA in Gender Studies (Inter-Faculty) lists Main application period opening on 2025-09-01 and closing on 2026-03-15. Source: https://www.gs.cuhk.edu.hk/admissions/application-deadline 15 March 2026 Applications will be processed on a rolling basis until all places have been filled. Therefore, early applications are strongly encouraged. Applications submitted after 15 Mar 2026 may be considered, subject to the availability of places.
